title: Xtra Crispy Spanish Dasima Kombu Paella
description: A crispy and flavorful Spanish dish featuring dasima-kombu, perfect for a brunch mood, this low-fat friendly recipe is cooked to perfection in a scallop shell vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Rinse the dasima and kombu in cold water, then cut them into small pieces.
In a large bowl, whisk together the char-grill yang sauce, olive oil, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken breast to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook in a skillet over medium-high heat until browned.
Add the dasima, kombu, and scalloped potatoes to the skillet and cook until the potatoes are tender.
Transfer the mixture to a scallop shell vessel and bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the dish from the oven and top with chopped scallions.
Return the dish to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the top is crispy and golden brown.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
